title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 18 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 18 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 18 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 18/07/2025
Today, DCE iron ore futures jumped initially and then pulled back, with the most-traded contract I2509 closing at 785, up0.38% for the day. Traders were highly motivated to sell. Steel mills purchased as needed, and with the weekend approaching, inquiry volumes slightly declined.
